/usr/bin/cc -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libmy_custom_msgs__python.so -o rosidl_generator_py/my_custom_msgs/libmy_custom_msgs__python.so CMakeFiles/my_custom_msgs__python.dir/rosidl_generator_py/my_custom_msgs/msg/_lidar_data_s.c.o CMakeFiles/my_custom_msgs__python.dir/rosidl_generator_py/my_custom_msgs/msg/_lidar_datas_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/data/python_projects/autonomous_driving/driving/ros_node/my_custom_msgs/build/my_custom_msgs:/opt/ros/galactic/lib: libmy_custom_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.8.so libmy_custom_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/galactic/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/galactic/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/galactic/lib/librcpputils.so /opt/ros/galactic/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
